max_capacity.description: Maximum number of capacity units the scalable resource can handle.

min_capacity.description: Minimum number of capacity units to be maintained for the scalable resource.

resource_id.description: Defines the unique identifier of the resource to be scaled, such as an ARN or name, depending on the service.

role_arn.description: IAM role ARN that grants Application Auto Scaling the required permissions to manage the scalable target.

scalable_dimension.description: Specifies the scalable dimension of the resource, defining the aspect of the resource to be scaled (e.g., read/write capacity for a DynamoDB table); must match the service namespace and resource type.

service_namespace.description: Specifies the namespace of the AWS service for which the scalable target is applicable; must match the service providing the resource.

suspended_state.description: Defines the suspended state configuration for scaling activities, specifying whether scale-in, scale-out, or both actions are temporarily suspended.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to associate with the resource; useful for organization, cost tracking, and management purposes.
